responseSchema.description: A single set of search results, with information for accessing other sets.

charityOrgs.description: The list of charitable organizations that match the search criteria.

items.description: The full location, ID, logo and other details of the charity organization.

charityOrgId.description: The ID of the charitable organization.

description.description: The description of the charitable organization.

address.description: The physical location of the item.

city.description: The city of the charitable organization.

country.description: The two-letter ISO 3166 standard of the country of the address. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

postalCode.description: The postal code of the charitable organization.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province of the charitable organization.

geoCoordinates.description: Defines the format of a geographic coordinate.

latitude.description: The latitude component of the geographic coordinate.

longitude.description: The longitude component of the geographic coordinate.

logoImage.description: The logo of the charitable organization.

height.description: The height of the logo image.

imageUrl.description: The URL to the logo image location.

width.description: The width of the logo image.

missionStatement.description: The mission statement of the charitable organization.

name.description: The name of the charitable organization.

registrationId.description:
The registration ID for the charitable organization.

Note: For the US marketplace, this is the EIN.

website.description: The link to the website for the charitable organization.

href.description: The relative path to the current set of results.

limit.description:
The number of items, from the result set, returned in a single page.

Valid Values: 1-100

Default: 20

next.description: The relative path to the next set of results.

offset.description:
The number of items that will be skipped in the result set. This is used with the limit field to control the pagination of the output.

For example, if the offset is set to 0 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 1 through 10 from the list of items returned. If the offset is set to 10 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 11 through 20 from the list of items returned.

Valid Values: 0-10,000

Default: 0

prev.description: The relative path to the previous set of results.

total.description: The total number of matches for the search criteria.
